title: hypericum elongatum var. racemosum
intro: Hypericum elongatum var. racemosum, also known as St. John's Wort, is a flowering plant native to Europe and Asia, belonging to the St. John's Wort family (Hypericaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing anxiety and depression, alleviating symptoms of insomnia, and promoting wound healing. St. John's Wort can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or oil, and is often used topically to treat skin conditions and internally to support mental health.
